Class BattleRoom

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.dongeon.BattleRoom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Room
public final class BattleRoom extends Object implements Room
Represents a room where a fight takes place. It contains enemies or a boss.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BattleRoom(Coordinate roomCoordinate, int heroLevel, boolean bossRoom)
    Creates a battle room.

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleRoom

      public BattleRoom(Coordinate roomCoordinate, int heroLevel, boolean bossRoom)
      Creates a battle room.
      Parameters:
      roomCoordinate - the position of the room.
      heroLevel - the level of the hero (to set enemy difficulty).
      bossRoom - true if this is a boss room.

  • Method Details

    • updateRoomState

      public void updateRoomState()
      Updates the state of the room during the fight. Specifically handles the logic for Bosses that can summon minions.

    • enemy

      public Enemy enemy(int index)
      Gets a specific enemy.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the enemy in the list.
      Returns:
      the enemy.

    • getEnemy

      public Enemy getEnemy(int index)
      Safe way to get an enemy (returns null if not found).
      Parameters:
      index - the index.
      Returns:
      the enemy or null.

    • enemies

      public List<Enemy> enemies()
      Returns the list of all enemies in the room.
      Returns:
      list of enemies.

    • isCleared

      public boolean isCleared()
      Checks if the room is safe (no enemies alive).
      Returns:
      true if all enemies are dead.

    • heroTurn

      public FightResult heroTurn(Fight fight, HeroActionType action, int amount, int index)
      Executes the hero's turn in the fight.
      Parameters:
      fight - the current fight state.
      action - the action the hero does.
      amount - the damage amount.
      index - which enemy to target.
      Returns:
      the result of the turn.

    • enemyTurn

      public FightResult enemyTurn(Fight fight, int index)
      Executes the enemy's turn.
      Parameters:
      fight - the current fight state.
      index - the index of the enemy attacking.
      Returns:
      the result of the turn.

    • coordRoom

      public Coordinate coordRoom()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the coordinates of the room on the map.
      Specified by:
      coordRoom in interface Room
      Returns:
      the coordinate.

    • getSymbol

      public String getSymbol()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the symbol used to draw the room.
      Specified by:
      getSymbol in interface Room
      Returns:
      a string symbol (like "S" or "T").

    • getType

      public TypeRoom getType()
      Description copied from interface: Room
      Returns the type of the room.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface Room
      Returns:
      the TypeRoom enum.

    • claimRewards

      public void claimRewards(Hero hero)
      Gives XP to the hero when the fight is over.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero who won.

    • battleInfo

      public String battleInfo(Hero hero, int turn)
      Creates a string to show the current status of the battle.
      Parameters:
      hero - the hero.
      turn - the current turn number.
      Returns:
      the battle info text.
